_comment: Verax Tier-0 local pre-push gate for 4DA (TypeScript/Tauri + node + cargo). Runs the FAST / DETERMINISTIC / OFFLINE subset of .github/workflows/validate.yml's Frontend job at $0, no GitHub dependency: typecheck (tsc), eslint, the vitest suite, the script self-tests, and the structural validators (file-sizes, no-window-spawns, IPC commands, i18n translations). DELIBERATELY EXCLUDED from the per-push gate (they belong in a merge-time Tier-1 / CI): `pnpm audit` (network), `validate:vite-smoke` (a full vite build — slow), and the Cargo/Tauri `src-tauri` build (heavy — a Tier-1 concern). Assumes deps installed (pnpm install). Run via .githooks/pre-push (install: tools/install-gate.sh) or `verax pipeline --spec .verax/gate.json`.
